channel.title: Deep Learning on Arindam Chowdhury
channel.description: Recent content in Deep Learning on Arindam Chowdhury

item.title: Reasoning over Graph Images
item.description: Visual Understanding of graph images by automatic answering of reasoning-based questions

item.title: Handwritten Text Recognition
item.description: Developed an end-to-end connectionist model for handwritten text recognition from document images.

item.title: Deep Face Recognition
item.description: Developed a face recognition/verification system for faces in wild.

item.title: Deep Reader
item.description: Contributed to the development of a deep learning based platform for image information retrieval.
